is an annual [knockout](/wiki/Single-elimination_tournament "Single-elimination tournament") [basketball](/wiki/Basketball "Basketball") competition between the clubs from Slovenia. It is currently named **Pokal Spar** due to sponsorship reasons.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Sports competition in Slovenia

Slovenian Basketball Cup

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Sport | [Basketball](/wiki/Basketball "Basketball") |
| Founded | 1991 |
| Country | Slovenia |
| Continent | Europe |
| Most recent champion | [Cedevita Olimpija](/wiki/KK_Cedevita_Olimpija "KK Cedevita Olimpija") (25th title) |
| Most titles | Cedevita Olimpija (25 titles) |
| Related competitions | [Slovenian Basketball League](/wiki/Slovenian_Basketball_League "Slovenian Basketball League") [Slovenian Supercup](/wiki/Slovenian_Basketball_Supercup "Slovenian Basketball Supercup") |
| Official website | [Official website](https://www.kzs.si/tekmovanja/pokalna-tekmovanja/pokal-spar?tab=tekme) |

The **Slovenian Basketball Cup** is an annual [knockout](/wiki/Single-elimination_tournament "Single-elimination tournament") [basketball](/wiki/Basketball "Basketball") competition between the clubs from Slovenia. It is currently named **Pokal Spar** due to sponsorship reasons.

## Title holders

* 1992–93 Smelt Olimpija
* 1993–94 Smelt Olimpija
* 1994–95 Smelt Olimpija

* 1997–98 [Union Olimpija](/wiki/KK_Olimpija "KK Olimpija")

* 2024–25 Cedevita Olimpija
* 2025–26 Cedevita Olimpija
